logic.example: There is no logic in his argument.

logical.example_zh: 她給了一個合乎邏輯的解釋。

loosen.example: He loosened his tie after work.

lousy.example: I had a lousy day at school.
lousy.example_zh: 我在學校度過了糟糕的一天。

loyal.example: A dog is a loyal pet.

loyalty.example: We value loyalty in a friend.

luxurious.example: They stayed in a luxurious hotel.
luxurious.example_zh: 他們住在一家豪華飯店。

luxury.example: A daily massage is a luxury.

machinery.example_zh: 這家工廠使用重型機械。

magnetic.example: A compass uses a magnetic needle.

magnificent.example_zh: 這座宮殿真是宏偉壯麗。

makeup.example: She put on light makeup for the show.
We studied the makeup of the team.
makeup.example_zh: 我們研究了這支隊伍的組成。

manual.example: Read the manual before using the machine.
manual.example_zh: 使用機器前先讀說明書。

manual.example: He does manual work on the farm.

manufacture.example: They manufacture cars in this city.
manufacture.example_zh: 他們在這座城市製造汽車。

manufacture.example: The manufacture of toys is big here.
manufacture.example_zh: 玩具製造業在這裡規模很大。

manufacturer.example_zh: 製造商測試了每件產品。

marathon.example: She trained hard to run a marathon.
marathon.example_zh: 她努力訓練以跑馬拉松。

margin.example: Write your notes in the margin.
margin.example_zh: 在頁邊空白處寫下你的筆記。

margin.example: He won by a small margin.

maturity.example: She handled the problem with maturity.
maturity.example_zh: 她以成熟的態度處理了問題。

maximum.example: The maximum speed here is sixty.
maximum.example_zh: 這裡的最高速限是六十。

maximum.example: The room holds a maximum of ten people.

measurable.example: There was a measurable rise in temperature.

measure-2.example: The school took measures to keep students safe.
measure-2.example_zh: 學校採取措施保護學生安全。

mechanic.example: The mechanic fixed my car quickly.
mechanic.example_zh: 那名技工很快修好了我的車。

mechanical.example: The clock has a mechanical part inside.
mechanical.example_zh: 這個時鐘裡有個機械零件。

memorable.example: The trip was a memorable experience.
memorable.example_zh: 這趟旅行是次難忘的經歷。

memorial.example: They built a memorial for the heroes.
memorial.example_zh: 他們為英雄們建了一座紀念碑。
我們舉行了一場追思會。

memorize.example: I need to memorize these words.

merchant.example: The merchant sold silk and spices.
merchant.example_zh: 那名商人販賣絲綢和香料。

mercy.example: The king showed mercy to the prisoner.
mercy.example_zh: 國王對囚犯展現了慈悲。

mere.example: It cost a mere ten dollars.

messenger.example_zh: 一名信差送來了這封信。

messy.example_zh: 他的房間總是亂七八糟。

microscope.example: We looked at cells through a microscope.
microscope.example_zh: 我們透過顯微鏡觀察細胞。

mild.example: The weather is mild in spring.

mill.example: The mill grinds wheat into flour.
mill.example_zh: 這座磨坊把小麥磨成麵粉。

mill.example: They mill grain at the factory.

millionaire.example: He became a millionaire from his business.
millionaire.example_zh: 他靠生意成了百萬富翁。

miner.example_zh: 那名礦工在很深的地底下工作。

mineral.example_zh: 牛奶含有有益的礦物質。

minimum.example: The minimum age to enter is twelve.
minimum.example_zh: 入場的最低年齡是十二歲。

minister.example: The minister gave a speech on TV.
minister.example_zh: 部長在電視上發表了演說。

minister.example: The minister led the church service.
minister.example_zh: 牧師主持了教堂的禮拜。

ministry.example: She works for the Ministry of Education.

mischief.example: The kids got into mischief while alone.
mischief.example_zh: 孩子們獨處時搞起了惡作劇。

miserable.example: He felt miserable when he was sick.

misfortune.example: She faced misfortune but never gave up.
misfortune.example_zh: 她遭遇不幸卻從不放棄。

mislead.example: The false sign misled the drivers.
mislead.example_zh: 那個錯誤的標誌誤導了駕駛。

moderate.example: Eat a moderate amount of sweets.

modesty.example: His modesty made everyone like him.
modesty.example_zh: 他的謙遜讓大家都喜歡他。

monitor.example: The nurse monitored the patient closely.
She looked at the computer monitor.

monument.example: The monument honors the brave soldiers.
monument.example_zh: 這座紀念碑紀念那些勇敢的士兵。

moreover.example: It is late; moreover, I am tired.

motivate.example: A good teacher can motivate students.

motivation.example: Her motivation to win was strong.

mountainous.example: The country is mountainous and cold.

muddy.example: His boots were covered in muddy water.

mule.example: The mule carried goods up the hill.

multiple.example: There are multiple ways to solve it.

murderer.example: The murderer was sent to prison.

murmur.example: She heard a low murmur from the crowd.
murmur.example_zh: 她聽見人群中傳來低低的私語聲。

murmur.example: He murmured a few words and left.
